DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anton F. Hasenkampf (415-273-7464) of Allen Matkins for Onewest Bank, defendant and moving party / Richard Abdallah (916-446-1974) of Abdallah Law Group specially appearing via CourtCall for James Morrison, plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT ONEWEST BANK, FSB'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED. Court takes under submission whether the demurrer should be sustained with leave to amend to address issue raised in demurrer or sustained without leave to amend. Moving party is to submit an order to the court with the language with or without leave to amend. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anton F. Hasenkampf (415-273-7464) of Allen Matkins for OWB REO, LLC, defendant and moving party / Richard Abdallah (916-446-1974) of Abdallah Law Group specially appearing via CourtCall for James Morrison, plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT OWB REO, LLC DEMURRER'S TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED. Court takes under submission whether the demurrer should be sustained with leave to amend to address issue raised in demurrer or sustained without leave to amend. Moving party is to submit an order to the court with the language with or without leave to amend. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Continued To Mar-20-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Anton L. Hasenkampf of Allen Matkins Leck Gamble Mallory & Natsis LLP 9415-837-1515) appearing for defendant OWB Reo, LLC. moving party. No other appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT OWB REO, LLC'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend to allege actionable violations other than purported violations alleged in first amended complaint and allege tender and prejudice; Plaintiff fails to 1) provide any authority for proposition that assignment of Deed of Trust needs to be recorded to be effective; 2) Plaintiff's reading of CC 2924(g) is not plausible. Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Anton L. Hasenkampf of Allen Matkins Leck Gamble Mallory & Natsis LLP 9415-837-1515) appearing for defendant Onewest Bank, FSB moving party. No other appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ONEWEST BANK, FSB's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend to allege actionable violations other than purported violations alleged in first amended complaint and allege tender and prejudice; Plaintiff fails to 1) provide any authority for proposition that assignment of Deed of Trust needs to be recorded to be effective; 2) Plaintiff's reading of CC 2924(g) is not plausible. Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Continued To Jan-30-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Orders To Consolidate The Unlawful Detainer Action With The Instant Action
Off Calendar Oct-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Anton L. Hasenkampf of Allen Matkins (415-273-7464) appearing for defendant Meridian Foreclosure Service opposing party opposing party. No other appearance.

Tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF JAMES MORRISON's Motion For Orders To Consolidate The Unlawful Detainer Action With The Instant Action is Denied without prejudice. Demurrer was sustained with leave to amend on September 28, 2012. Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reproted. (501/REQ)
